name: Waxell Policy Decision Structure
description: Logical structure for the result of a runtime governance policy evaluation in Waxell.

fields.name: category
fields.source: One of the 26 Waxell policy categories

fields.name: retry_after_seconds
fields.source: Set when decision is throttle or retry

context.evaluatedAt: Pre-execution, mid-execution between agent steps, or post-execution per @waxell.observe configuration
context.raises: PolicyViolationError when decision is block or throttle
